headline: Building Automation System Company Evaluation Report 2025: Johnson Controls, Honeywell and Siemens Lead with AI-Driven Energy Management, Building Automation and Integrated Safety Systems
summary: The Building Automation System Companies Quadrant offers in-depth insights into the global BAS market, highlighting top players, tech advancements, and industry trends. This analysis categorizes the 28 leading companies, including Johnson Controls, Honeywell International, and Siemens, as quadrant leaders.
